final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-editorial
Asset type: fine art digital painting, square crop
Primary request: a classical Chinese beauty in elaborate hanfu seated on a wooden pavilion in a Jiangnan water town, holding a round fan, glancing back over her shoulder toward the distance
Scene/backdrop: Jiangnan water town pavilion surrounded by a blooming lotus pond — pink-white lotus flowers swaying gently in the breeze, dewdrops rolling on broad lotus leaves; background features Huizhou-style architecture with white-washed walls and dark grey roof tiles, winding bluestone paths, a few white egrets skimming low over the water
Subject: elegant classical Chinese woman in light celadon-and-gold embroidered hanfu, elaborate hair bun adorned with jade hairpin and pearl ornaments, refined and graceful makeup, holding a decorative round fan, turning her head to gaze into the distance
Style/medium: fusion of gongbi (fine-line) meticulous brushwork and xieyi (freehand) ink wash painting; delicate linework with poetic, atmospheric mood; traditional Chinese painting aesthetic
Composition/framing: symmetrical composition, mid-distance full-figure shot, pavilion centered, lotus pond framing both sides
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight, gentle and serene, poetic Eastern aesthetic, tranquil and elegant atmosphere
Color palette: celadon, ivory white, soft pink, muted gold, dark ink grey, jade green — clean and refined palette
Materials/textures: silk fabric with fine embroidery detail, weathered wood grain on pavilion, smooth lotus petals, glistening water droplets on lotus leaves, aged stone path texture
Constraints: maintain symmetrical composition; preserve celadon and gold as dominant garment colors; keep white egrets and Huizhou architecture in background
Avoid: modern styling, Western painting style, over-saturated colors, deformed hands or fingers, watermark
